title: Title
description: Cover slide — every student, every minute, accounted for.

title: The Problem
description: Districts run SPED compliance on spreadsheets — comp-ed liability is compounding.

title: Why Now
description: Regulation, workforce, and budget forces colliding for the first time.

title: The Solution
description: One platform, three jobs done: schedule, document, defend.

title: Product
description: Four product surfaces a district uses on day one.

title: Market
description: MA beachhead, Northeast expansion, US TAM.

title: Traction
description: Three pilot districts, zero churn, comp-ed exposure surfaced.

title: Team
description: Operators who lived the problem, not consultants who studied it.

title: The Ask
description: Raising $4.5M to own Massachusetts by fall 2027.
